'''jonasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweedy|tweedy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweedy|tweedy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jonasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonasithi|jonasithi]] || [[word:jonasiji|jonasiji]] || [[word:jonasishi|jonasishi]] || [[word:jonasiki|jonasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonasuthuthu|jonasuthuthu]] || [[word:jonasujuju|jonasujuju]] || [[word:jonasushushu|jonasushushu]] || [[word:jonasukuku|jonasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonasuthu|jonasuthu]] || [[word:jonasuju|jonasuju]] || [[word:jonasushu|jonasushu]] || [[word:jonasuku|jonasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonasufthuf|jonasufthuf]] || [[word:jonasufjuf|jonasufjuf]] || [[word:jonasufshuf|jonasufshuf]] || [[word:jonasufkuf|jonasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonasethe|jonasethe]] || [[word:jonaseje|jonaseje]] || [[word:jonaseshe|jonaseshe]] || [[word:jonaseke|jonaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonasothotho|jonasothotho]] || [[word:jonasojojo|jonasojojo]] || [[word:jonasoshosho|jonasoshosho]] || [[word:jonasokoko|jonasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonasotho|jonasotho]] || [[word:jonasojo|jonasojo]] || [[word:jonasosho|jonasosho]] || [[word:jonasoko|jonasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonasofthof|jonasofthof]] || [[word:jonasofjof|jonasofjof]] || [[word:jonasofshof|jonasofshof]] || [[word:jonasofkof|jonasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfthÃŸf|jonasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfjÃŸf|jonasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfshÃŸf|jonasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfkÃŸf|jonasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jonasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jonasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jonasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jonasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfthÃŸf|jonasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfjÃŸf|jonasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfshÃŸf|jonasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfkÃŸf|jonasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfthÃŸf|jonasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfjÃŸf|jonasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfshÃŸf|jonasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jonasÃŸfkÃŸf|jonasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonasÃḊthÃḊ|jonasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jonasÃḊjÃḊ|jonasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jonasÃḊshÃḊ|jonasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jonasÃḊkÃḊ|jonasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonasathatha|jonasathatha]] || [[word:jonasajaja|jonasajaja]] || [[word:jonasashasha|jonasashasha]] || [[word:jonasakaka|jonasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonasatha|jonasatha]] || [[word:jonasaja|jonasaja]] || [[word:jonasasha|jonasasha]] || [[word:jonasaka|jonasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonasafthaf|jonasafthaf]] || [[word:jonasafjaf|jonasafjaf]] || [[word:jonasafshaf|jonasafshaf]] || [[word:jonasafkaf|jonasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jonasasha|jonasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonashÃḋsha|jonashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonasrosha|jonasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonasmusha|jonasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonasyasha|jonasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonasnkshÃḋsha|gojonasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonasnkrosha|gojonasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonasnkmusha|gojonasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonasnkyasha|gojonasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jonanasasha|jonanasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonanashÃḋsha|jonanashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonanasrosha|jonanasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonanasmusha|jonanasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonanasyasha|jonanasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonanasnkshÃḋsha|gojonanasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonanasnkrosha|gojonanasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonanasnkmusha|gojonanasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonanasnkyasha|gojonanasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jenÃḊsasha|jenÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jenÃḊshÃḋsha|jenÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jenÃḊsrosha|jenÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jenÃḊsmusha|jenÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jenÃḊsyasha|jenÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojenÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gojenÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojenÃḊsnkrosha|gojenÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojenÃḊsnkmusha|gojenÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojenÃḊsnkyasha|gojenÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jonfasasha|jonfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonfashÃḋsha|jonfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonfasrosha|jonfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonfasmusha|jonfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonfasyasha|jonfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonfasnkshÃḋsha|gojonfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonfasnkrosha|gojonfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonfasnkmusha|gojonfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonfasnkyasha|gojonfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
